star.situation: At ResearchGate, our platform team was responsible for shared tooling and infrastructure across multiple product teams.
star.task: I needed to create a sustainable process for addressing accumulated technical debt without sacrificing roadmap delivery.
action: Introduced 'Fix-it Friday' — a weekly time-box where engineers could tackle any tech debt or improvement they chose.
Created a dedicated Slack channel and ticket label so issues could be logged without interrupting flow.
Ran the initiative for one quarter, tracking participation and output.
star.result: Engineer satisfaction with the codebase improved noticeably. Several long-standing issues were resolved. The team reported feeling less frustrated and more in control of their work environment.

quality.notes: Strong structure. Result would benefit from quantitative metrics (e.g. ticket count resolved, satisfaction score).
